purpose_context: Existing Spec Kitty repos contain years of historical mission state in shapes that pre-date TeamSpace ingress rules. Before TeamSpace public launch, the spec-kitty-events package must publish a single source of truth for canonical lanes (including in_review), payload contracts (MissionCreated, WPStatusChanged, MissionClosed), and recursive forbidden-key validation, with conformance fixtures the CLI canonicalizer and SaaS ingress can rely on. This mission settles those contracts and their historical-shape fixtures so the downstream CLI, SaaS, runtime, and tracker tranches build on a stable foundation.
purpose_tldr: Settle the canonical event contract so historical mission state can migrate safely to TeamSpace.
